name: Dairyland Whippersmackers
recipeIngredient: 2 Packages Peanut Butter Chips (10 Oz Each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, butter, and cream cheese.
2. Add both sugars and beat well.
3. Add eggs, sour cream, ricotta, and cottage cheese; beat well.
4. Gradually add flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt, alternating with milk, buttermilk, whipping cream, sweetened condensed milk, and vanilla.
5. Stir in chocolate chips, walnuts, raisins, peanut butter chips, coconut, and chocolate chunks.
6. Drop by heaping teaspoonsful onto a lightly greased cookie sheet, 2 inches apart.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 12 minutes.
